title: Illumina COVIDSeq Test: Pool and Clean Up Libraries
author: Opentrons

steps.title: The Illumina COVIDSeq Test is a...
steps.instruction: The Illumina COVIDSeq Test is a high-throughput, next-generation sequencing test that is used fo detecting SARS-CoV-2 in patient samples. This protocol is the seventh part of a seven-part protocol that is run on the OT-2 for this kit. * Part 1: [Anneal RNA](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1) * Part 2: [Synthesize First Strand cDNA](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1-part-2) * Part 3: [Amplify cDNA](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1-part-3) * Part 4: [Tagment PCR Amplicons](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1-part-4) * Part 5: [Post Tagmentation Clean Up](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1-part-5) * Part 6: [Amplify Tagmented Amplicons](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1-part-6) * Part 7: [Pool and Clean Up Libraries](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1-part-7) Explanation of complex parameters below: * `P300 Multichannel GEN2 Pipette Mount`: Choose the mount position of your P300 Multichannel pipette, either left or right. * `P20 Multichannel GEN2 Pipette Mount`: Choose the mount position of your P20 Multichannel pipette, either left or right. ---

steps.title: Engage Magnetic Module and wait 3...
steps.instruction: Engage Magnetic Module and wait 3 minutes for beads to pellet.

steps.title: Pick up 20 uL tips from slot 7
steps.instruction: Pick up 20 uL tips from slot 7

steps.title: Aspirate 5 uL from Column 1...
steps.instruction: Aspirate 5 uL from Column 1 (A1) of the Magnetic Plate on Slot 3

steps.title: Pause protocol for vortexing and centrifuging 8-strip tube
steps.instruction: Pause protocol for vortexing and centrifuging 8-strip tube.

steps.title: Pick up SINGLE 200 uL tip from slot 4
steps.instruction: Pick up SINGLE 200 uL tip from slot 4

steps.title: Aspirate 55 uL from A1 of 8-strip tube
steps.instruction: Aspirate 55 uL from A1 of 8-strip tube

steps.title: Dispense 55 uL into 1
steps.instruction: Dispense 55 uL into 1.7 mL tube in A1 of Slot 6.
